Container.Name: Plexcache-D
Container.Overview: Automate Plex media management: Efficiently transfer media from the On Deck/Watchlist to an SSD cache, and seamlessly move watched media back to their respective locations. This app reduces energy consumption by minimizing the need to spin up the array/hard drive(s) when watching recurrent media like TV series. It achieves this by moving the media from the OnDeck and watchlist for the main user and/or other users. For TV shows/anime, it also fetches the next specified number of episodes.
Container.Requires: Plex Media Server must be accessible from this container. CA Mover Tuning plugin recommended (optional) for mover exclude list integration.

Config.Name: Config
Config.Description: Persistent storage for settings, logs, and tracking data

Config.Name: Cache
Config.Description: Your Unraid cache drive where media files are cached for fast access

Config.Name: Array
Config.Description: Direct array access (user0) for creating .plexcached backups

Config.Name: User
Config.Description: User share for Plex library path resolution

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID for file permissions (99 = nobody on Unraid)

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID for file permissions (100 = users on Unraid)

Config.Name: TZ
Config.Description: Timezone for accurate log timestamps and scheduling

Config.Name: Port
Config.Description: Web UI port for browser access

Config.Name: Unraid Notify Script
Config.Description: Unraid's notify script and PHP includes (for native notifications)
